context_for_next_testing_agent: Actuary Dashboard redesign verified. Key points: (1) Hero banner uses Deep Forest Green (#1C3B35) with pattern overlay. (2) Personalized welcome message shows first name. (3) Three stat cards: Active Requests, Completed, Total Lifetime. (4) Three cert sections: Pending Requests, In Progress, Completed with empty states. (5) Robert Chen has 1 validated cert (Bronze HDHP, Acme Corp). (6) Emily Park has 0 certs - shows all empty states. (7) Sidebar has Dashboard, Certifications, Marketplace links. (8) Employer dashboard unaffected.
